description.value:
Penal Colony

Penal colonies are the dumping grounds for the Imperium's most dangerous criminals and political dissidents. Life on such worlds is a brutal struggle for survival, where the only law is that of the strong and the cunning. Those who emerge from these hellish environments are often hardened beyond measure, possessing a keen instinct for danger and an intimate knowledge of the underworld's dark corners.

Homeworld Bonus

+Toughness, +Perception, –Influence

Homeworld Aptitude

Toughness

Wounds

10+1d5

Fate Threshold

3 (Emperor's Blessing 8+)

Starting Skills

Common Lore (Underworld) and Scrutiny

Homeworld Trait

Finger on the Pulse: The character begins with one rank in the Common Lore (Underworld) and Scrutiny skills, and starts with the Peer (Criminal Cartels) talent.

specialAbilities.name: Finger on the Pulse
specialAbilities.description: The character begins with one rank in the Common Lore (Underworld) and Scrutiny skills, and starts with the Peer (Criminal Cartels) talent.

system.notes: Emperor's Blessing: On a roll of 8+ on 1d10, the character begins with an extra Fate Point.
